name: bolt
description: Lightning-fast script launcher. Pin a Script Menu to the status bar for one-click access to your scripts.

bolt.scripts.description: Scripts to show in the Bolt menu. Use alias for the display name and path for the script location (e.g. ./scripts/deploy.sh or ~/scripts/backup.sh).

alias.description: Display name shown in the menu (e.g. "Reset DB", "Deploy")

path.description: Path to the script. Use ./ for workspace-relative, ~ for home, or / for absolute.
